taskRoleArn: <REPLACE: task role ARN with permission to read the two secrets below>

containerDefinitions.name: deep-agent-core-service
containerDefinitions.image: <REPLACE: ECR repository URI and tag, e.g. <ACCOUNT_ID>.dkr.ecr.<REGION>.amazonaws.com/deep-agent-core-service:latest>

secrets.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
secrets.valueFrom: <REPLACE: Secrets Manager ARN for the Anthropic API key>

secrets.name: DATABASE_URL
secrets.valueFrom: <REPLACE: Secrets Manager ARN for the Postgres connection string>

options.awslogs-group: <REPLACE: CloudWatch log group, matching this account's existing ECS service naming convention>
